decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/9 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 76/4081 lines reworked (1.9%, 29/50). 0/33 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 3.0% (8/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 67. Session 12: 46 (process:40 efficiency:6 ttfw:0).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 254/254 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
